note: v0.6.0 ships additive features only: recall_lessons(as_of_ts) point-in-time recall, pgmnemo.stats().ghost_count provenance metric, RAISE NOTICE on content-hash dedup, pgmnemo.recall_stats observability view (#26), PostGIS spatial pre-filter cookbook (#28), MIGRATION.md §Rollback, USAGE.md §Tuning. RRF Fix-A was implemented in development and reverted prior to tag — see spec/v060/INVESTIGATION_FIX_A_REGRESSION.md. recall_lessons() retrieval path is identical to v0.5.1; ORDER BY clause in recall_hybrid() is unchanged (`fusion_score`-based). Δ=0 confirmed analytically.

additive_recall_api: extension/pgmnemo--0.5.1--0.6.0.sql (as_of_ts param added to recall_lessons signature; default NULL preserves v0.5.1 behavior)
additive_observability: extension/pgmnemo--0.5.1--0.6.0.sql (ghost_count BIGINT added to pgmnemo.stats() output)
extension/pgmnemo--0.5.1--0.6.0.sql (RAISE NOTICE added to pgmnemo.ingest() bitemporal close+create trigger)
extension/pgmnemo--0.5.1--0.6.0.sql (pgmnemo.recall_stats view added — #26 R9 hit-count metric)
docs_only: docs/USAGE.md (§Tuning recency × temporal_boost table added for Q7)

analytical_proof.sql_change_nature: additive only — recall_lessons() takes one new optional param with NULL default; stats() returns one new BIGINT column; ingest() emits NOTICE on existing trigger path; recall_stats view is new; recall_hybrid() ORDER BY clause IDENTICAL to v0.5.1 (Fix-A reverted)

methodology_note: v0.6.0 is a feature-additive release where every change is either (a) a new optional parameter with NULL default that preserves v0.5.1 behavior on existing call sites, (b) a new output column on a diagnostic SP, (c) a NOTICE-only addition with no semantic effect, (d) a new view that doesn't affect recall_lessons, or (e) documentation. The recall_lessons()/recall_hybrid() retrieval path is byte-identical to v0.5.1 for callers who don't pass as_of_ts. Metrics carried forward from v0.5.1 gate (run date 2026-05-18). Δ=0 across all metrics. RRF Fix-A was implemented and benchmarked during development but reverted before tag — full root-cause analysis in spec/v060/INVESTIGATION_FIX_A_REGRESSION.md.
